title_en: Metallic waves on ancient Mars
summary_en: The European Space Agency’s Mars Express has spotted a swathe of metallic-looking waves filling Mars’s large Kaiser Crater – an ancient and otherworldly dune field sculpted by wind.

title_en: Artemis II astronauts visit ESA
summary_en: Yesterday, the four Artemis II astronauts visited ESA’s technical site in the Netherlands, where they met the team behind the European Service Module that powered their Orion spacecraft around the Moon and safely back to Earth.

title_en: SpaceX launches Falcon 9 rocket on record-breaking 36th flight
summary_en: The flight-leading booster, B1067, launched the Starlink 10-42 mission from Cape Canaveral Space Force Station. Liftoff from pad 40 happened at 5:25 a.m. EDT (0925 UTC) on Thursday morning.

title_en: Fire detectors, military tech demos, 3D printers among SpaceX rideshare payloads launching on midnight Falcon 9 flight
summary_en: SpaceX launched a series of 81 payloads to a Sun-synchronous Earth orbit over a roughly 2.5-hour-long deployment period. Liftoff from pad 4E at Vandenberg Space Force Base happened at 12:12 a.m. PDT (0312 EDT / 0712 UTC).
title_ru: Пожарные детекторы, демонстрации военных технологий, 3D-принтеры среди полезной нагрузки SpaceX, запускаемой в полночный полет Falcon 9
summary_ru: SpaceX запустила серию из 81 полезной нагрузки на солнечно-синхронную орбиту Земли в течение периода развертывания примерно 2,5 часа. Старт с площадки 4E на базе космических сил Ванденберг произошел в 12:12 по тихоокеанскому времени (03:12 по восточному поясному времени / 07:12 по всемирному координированному времени).

title_en: Semiconductor manufacturing test bed flies alongside Starlink satellites on Falcon 9 launch
summary_en: Liftoff of the Starlink 10-50 mission from Space Launch Complex 40 happened at 6:50 a.m. EDT (1050 UTC). The rocket's first-stage booster carried two semiconductor manufacturing pods for Besxar Space Industries.

title_en: SpaceX launches 24 Starlink satellites on Falcon 9 rocket from Vandenberg SFB
summary_en: The Starlink 17-46 mission flew on the 77th Falcon 9 rocket launch of the year. Liftoff from pad 4E at Vandenberg Space Force Base happened at 7:58 p.m. PDT (10:58 p.m. EDT / 0258 UTC).
